top_signals.title: Iran war puts $124 billion Persian Gulf remittance lifeline at risk
top_signals.summary: Migrant workers in the six Gulf Cooperation Council countries sent an estimated $124 billion home in 2024, supporting families from Asia and the broader Middle East to Africa.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stocks Drift, Oil Falls After US-Iran Peace Talks: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in the US and Europe struggled for direction, finding little support from lower oil prices following signs of diplomatic headway between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin is stuck near $64,000 as ETF outflows reach a sixth week
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CRH Near Biggest-Ever Deal for Arcosa, Financial Times Says
top_signals.summary: Building materials group CRH Plc. is close to its biggest deal ever to acquire competitor Arcosa Inc., and an agreement could come as soon as next week, the Financial Times reports, citing people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Trump builds a new U.S. tariff wall in shakeup of winners and losers
top_signals.summary: A new round of Trump tariffs is taking shape after the Supreme Court blocked his earlier measures, with countries from the Philippines to Singapore facing very different outcomes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
